scenarios.description: children() returns cached Elements list when attributes userData cache is present
scenarios.precondition: element has initialized attributes and one Element child, and cache populated by prior children() call
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() call returns same number of children via cache branch
pseudocode: // Arrange an element with attributes and one child Element
parent.attributes();                  // ensure attributes and userData exist
// Act: second call should hit cache
// Assert: both lists have size 1 and reflect cache branch
